name: Cran-Raspberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
BASE ----
Preheat oven to 450°F.
Grease a jelly roll pan and line it with wax paper.
Grease and flour the wax paper.
In a large bowl, beat together the yolks, eggs, 1/2 cup sugar, and almonds until the mixture is tripled in volume and nearly white (about 5 minutes).
Stir in vanilla extract.
Sift cake flour over the batter and fold it in with a spatula.
Beat egg whites and cream of tartar until small peaks form. Gradually add 1 tablespoon sugar, beating to stiff peaks. Fold into the egg mixture with a spatula.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
Bake for 7 minutes or until lightly browned and springy.
Invert onto a wire rack; remove wax paper.
Using the pan as a cookie cutter, cut out a round base for the cake.
Use shaped cookie cutters to cut shapes from the remaining cake to place on top of the cake.
Place the cake in the bottom of a prepared springform pan.
